descriptionHtml:
Galeon 500 Fly for sale 2023 | 3 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

ONLY 70 hours engine use!!

If you are considering a modern motor yacht for family cruising or entertaining guests, this Galeon 500 Fly for sale 2023 is a good choice currently available on the market. She is a privately owned, VAT-paid example, registered under the St. Kitts and Nevis flag, and is presented in good condition. Delivered new in 2023, she offers a combination of innovative design, advanced technology, and highly practical features that make her ideal for both relaxation and adventure on the water.

Galeon 500 Fly for Sale 2023 – Key Specifications:

  • Engines: 2 x Volvo D8 600hp, shaft drive (approx. 70 hours as of December 2025)
  • Generator: Fischer Panda 15kWA (approx. 80 hours as of December 2025)
  • LOA: 16.20m
  • Beam: 4.46m
  • Draft: 1.00m
  • Cabins: 2 double, 1 upper/lower, 1 skipper aft
  • Heads: 3
  • Berths: Up to 12
  • Onboard capacity: 8 persons
  • Water tank: 650L
  • Fuel tank: 1800L
  • Air conditioning: Yes

Navigation and Technology:

  • Full Raymarine navigation suite (multifunction displays, GPS, autopilot, plotter)
  • Raymarine Autopilot Evolution DBW
  • Bowthruster with joystick control
  • Two steering positions

Domestic and Comfort Features:

  • Oven, refrigerator, dishwasher, washing machine
  • Convertible galley bar area
  • LED ceiling lights throughout
  • Electric fridge on flybridge
  • Fusion Apollo surround sound system (saloon, cockpit, flybridge), amplifier, wireless phone charging dock
  • Electric sliding 32" TV in saloon
  • Air conditioning

Exterior and Deck:

  • Laminated hardtop on flybridge with electric opening soft roof
  • Foldable aft balconies and sliding side windows aft
  • Extended hydraulic bathing platform with shower
  • Deck shower
  • Permateek synthetic teak on bath platform, cockpit, decks, and balcony
  • Hydraulic box system pasarelle
  • Black antifouling

This Galeon 500 Fly for sale 2023 is maintained in good condition, and is ready for her next owner to enjoy memorable cruising. She is available for viewing and offers a modern, practical layout suited for family, friends, or longer voyages with crew. For buyers seeking a mid-sized flybridge yacht that combines modern styling with comfort and seakeeping, this is a strong option worth considering. Contact us for more details!
